title: Entity Interface Library
text: Entity Interface Library Use this editor to model a reusable value for the Database Interface property of entities. The Database Interface property defines the entity's physical characteristics in a database. For more information, see Database Interface (Entities) . Properties Name Description Character Set Wide Character Behavior Identification Type Entity Identifier First Occurrence Identifier Next Occurrence Identifier Fixed Length of Entity Fixed Length of Occurrence Comments How to Working with Modeled Properties Related Links Modeled Entity Interface A Modeled Entity Interface is a Development Object that defines a reusable value for the Database Interface property of a Database Entity.
